label: Duplication
summary: Copy-paste and repeated structure across modules or functions.

rules.label: Cross File Copy Paste Function
rules.description: Highly similar non-test function bodies repeated across multiple Python files.
rules.explanation: In Python, Cross File Copy Paste Function matters because the pattern here, Highly similar non-test function bodies repeated across multiple Python files, turns local work into repeated cost that spreads with traffic or input size.
rules.fix: For Cross File Copy Paste Function in Python, move one-time initialization, parsing, or allocation outside the loop when the per-iteration state does not actually change.

rules.label: Cross File Repeated Literal
rules.description: Project repeats the same long string literal across multiple files.
rules.explanation: In Python, Cross File Repeated Literal matters because the pattern here, Project repeats the same long string literal across multiple files, turns local work into repeated cost that spreads with traffic or input size.
rules.fix: For Cross File Repeated Literal in Python, prefer a builder, buffer, or one-time composition step instead of growing the same value incrementally.

rules.label: Duplicate Error Handler Block
rules.description: Repeated exception-handling block shapes in one file.
rules.explanation: In Python, Duplicate Error Handler Block matters because the pattern here, Repeated exception-handling block shapes in one file, turns local work into repeated cost that spreads with traffic or input size.
rules.fix: For Duplicate Error Handler Block in Python, move one-time initialization, parsing, or allocation outside the loop when the per-iteration state does not actually change.

rules.label: Duplicate Query Fragment
rules.description: Repository repeats the same SQL-like query fragment across multiple files.
rules.explanation: In Python, Duplicate Query Fragment matters because the pattern here, Repository repeats the same SQL-like query fragment across multiple files, lets layer-specific contracts leak into places that should stay simpler and easier to test.
rules.fix: For Duplicate Query Fragment in Python, choose one layer to own the contract shape and perform the mapping there instead of passing boundary-specific types through the stack.

rules.label: Duplicate Test Utility Logic
rules.description: Highly similar utility logic shared between test and production code.
rules.explanation: In Python, Duplicate Test Utility Logic matters because the pattern here, Highly similar utility logic shared between test and production code, weakens the evidence that tests or review are supposed to provide.
rules.fix: For Duplicate Test Utility Logic in Python, tighten the tests until the failure mode, edge case, or assertion signal is obvious to a reviewer.

rules.label: Duplicate Transformation Pipeline
rules.description: Repository repeats the same data transformation pipeline stages across multiple functions.
rules.explanation: In Python, Duplicate Transformation Pipeline matters because the pattern here, Repository repeats the same data transformation pipeline stages across multiple functions, pushes data or model work into a shape that is harder to scale, cache, or reproduce.
rules.fix: For Duplicate Transformation Pipeline in Python, move expensive data or model work to the right pipeline stage, cache stable results, and keep the runtime path lean.

rules.label: Duplicate Validation Pipeline
rules.description: Repeated validation guard pipelines across functions in one file.
rules.explanation: In Python, Duplicate Validation Pipeline matters because the pattern here, Repeated validation guard pipelines across functions in one file, pushes data or model work into a shape that is harder to scale, cache, or reproduce.
rules.fix: For Duplicate Validation Pipeline in Python, move expensive data or model work to the right pipeline stage, cache stable results, and keep the runtime path lean.

rules.label: Repeated String Literal
rules.description: Project repeats the same long string literal multiple times in one file.
rules.explanation: In Python, Repeated String Literal matters because the pattern here, Project repeats the same long string literal multiple times in one file, turns local work into repeated cost that spreads with traffic or input size.
rules.fix: For Repeated String Literal in Python, prefer a builder, buffer, or one-time composition step instead of growing the same value incrementally.
